name: Short Ribs in Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the short ribs and pat them dry with paper towels.
2. Place the short ribs, 8 cups of water, onions, green peppers, celery, salt, and pepper in a heavy 6-quart pot.
3. Heat over medium-high heat until boiling.
4. Reduce the heat to simmering.
5. Simmer until the short ribs are tender, about 1 1/2 to 2 hours.
6. Remove the short ribs to a bowl and keep warm.
